name: Reduced Withholding on Partnership Interest Dispositions

eligibility.description: Requires a formal request to the Secretary by the transferor or transferee based on the actual expected tax liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the IRS to prescribe a reduced withholding amount (less than 10%) on the disposition of a partnership interest if it doesn't jeopardize tax collection.
